description_long: This is a white racing coupe car with the number 72 prominently displayed on the roof, doors, and hood. The car features a streamlined, aerodynamic body with a low stance, wide fenders, and a rear spoiler for added downforce. The wheels are fitted with slick racing tires and gold-colored rims, and the side panels display various sponsor decals. The front end has a wide grille and aggressive headlights, while the rear is equipped with dual tail lights and a subtle bumper. The windows are tinted, and the overall design is optimized for speed and performance. The car's build and markings suggest it is intended for competitive motorsport environments.
description: A white racing coupe car with number 72, sponsor decals, gold rims, and a rear spoiler, designed for high-speed performance.
description_view_0: Rear view showing dual tail lights, rear bumper, spoiler, and the number 72 on the roof.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the number 72 on the door, sponsor decals, gold rims, and aerodynamic body lines.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the wide grille, aggressive headlights, and number 72 on the hood and roof.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible sponsor decals, number 72, and gold rims.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
